info.title: mk-piclock API
info.description: Local HTTP API for mk-piclock 1.8.1. A simple optional plaintext password can protect API routes on the trusted home network.

get.summary: Check whether a web password is configured and whether this browser is authenticated

post.summary: Authenticate with the optional web password

200.description: Authenticated or no password is configured

post.summary: Set or remove the optional plaintext web password
post.description: Send an empty password to remove password protection.

401.description: Authentication required when a password already exists

get.description: Returns live display, audio, bedtime, touch, image, font, message, alarm, and calibrated RGB lighting state.

post.summary: Upload one or more MP3 files for asynchronous optimization

400.description: No valid MP3 files or unsupported settings

409.description: Another MP3 is queued or processing
The same filename is still processing

503.description: Deleted, but the clock core could not be notified

post.summary: Upload a TTF or OTF font

409.description: Alarm must be stopped with the physical touch sensor, or bedtime music is disabled

post.description: Supported actions include clock, clear, stop, play-music, and play-story.

post.summary: Send or schedule a text, image, or combined message

image_file.description: Raw image filename. Leave empty to select a random image from the chosen library.

message_text.description: Optional message text. Leave empty for an image-only message.

scheduled_at.description: Unix time for a specific delivery time. Must be within 30 days and cannot be combined with a non-zero delay_seconds.

image_bedtime.description: Use 1 to choose from Bedtime Images and 0 to choose from Day Images.

notification_sound.description: Use 1 to play the built-in short chime when the message appears.

post.description: Story Mode accepts story_enabled, story_volume, and story_message.

bedtime_music_enabled.description: Allow manual touch and browser music during bedtime

post.summary: Render an exact message draft framebuffer without changing the OLED

200.description: Packed 4-bit 256x64 OLED framebuffer rendered by the core

422.description: Message does not fit the OLED

get.summary: Download all day source PNG images

200.description: ZIP archive containing only source PNG files

404.description: No source PNG files are available

get.summary: Download all bedtime source PNG images

200.description: ZIP archive containing only source PNG files

404.description: No source PNG files are available

get.summary: Read network, platform, device identity, operating-system, storage, SD-card, service, and alarm diagnostics
Download settings and user assets as a ZIP backup

post.summary: Reset settings and remove user-added assets

409.description: Alarm or music processing is active

get.summary: List stories and Story Mode settings

503.description: Story saved, but the clock core could not be notified

507.description: Story quota or available storage would be exceeded

503.description: Deleted, but the clock core could not be notified

post.summary: Save one RGB LED activity profile

cycle_seconds.description: Full fade or rainbow cycle duration.
Full fade or rainbow cycle duration.

bypass_master.description: Temporarily enable the LED for previews or wiring tests even when the master switch is off.

raw_output.description: Bypass brightness limits and channel calibration for a direct wiring test.

post.summary: Save global RGB lighting controls and calibration
